system.description:
The art and practice of negotiation and diplomacy in a myriad of social situations. This skill covers diplomatic meetings, haggling with merchants, or diffusing a situation before blades start flashing.
  • Getting a good deal in the marketplace: Liaison/INT 8+ (or Opposed)
  • Negotiating a fair surrender when you've won: Liaison/SOC 8+
  • When you've lost: Liaison/SOC 12+
  • Stopping a fight from breaking out: Liaison/SOC 10+
  • Negotiating a business contract: Liaison/INT 10+
system.shortdescr: Negotiation and diplomacy; haggling, diffusing situations.
